name: Content Pipeline Workflow
objective: Produce content through role-bound planning, drafting, review, and artifact verification.

roles.role_spec: Define audience, channel, constraints, and acceptance criteria.
roles.execution_spec: Use LLM reasoning to produce a content brief before drafting.
roles.output_spec: Return content brief, outline, gates, and required artifacts.

roles.role_spec: Verify accuracy, tone, format, and publication readiness.
roles.execution_spec: Use LLM review plus checklist evidence before pass/fail.
roles.output_spec: Return review decision, required edits, and failure_state when blocked.

gates.condition: Audience, channel, claims, and acceptance criteria are explicit.
Final content satisfies review checklist and required artifacts exist.
